creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to madwebness from comment #23)

Some of that sounds like a separate report, bug 253746. (It's unfortunate that <https://www.freebsd.org/gnome/#_state_of_the_port> does not mention anything like this.)

If you need orientation, please take one of the community options: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/community/>

----

Whilst here: post-closure triage.
